description: Main-window capability. 'allow-all' is NOT Tauri's blanket allow: it is the app-local permission set defined in permissions/avalanche.toml that grants every custom app-core command (login, next_events, load_conversations, ...). It is load-bearing — removing it denies all custom commands, so startup session-restore fails and the app drops to the login screen. It only covers app commands; core plugin commands (e.g. core:window:allow-start-dragging for window dragging) must be granted separately below.
